description: Primary constellation contracts repository for regions, moods, events, personas, and policies. Schema authority for T1-core object kinds.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: T1-core schema repos must not contain raw narrative content; contract definitions only.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All artifacts must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include target metadata for routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests must reference the routing spine for route resolution.

authoringHints.summary: T1-core schema authority repo. Define contract schemas and examples here; instances live in vault repos.
aiBehavior: Always verify schemaRef before generating contract artifacts
Route moodContract and regionContractCard T1-core requests to this repo
Do not generate raw narrative content; focus on schema structure and constraints
